ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monthly_data" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric being analyzed */,
  "lower_limit" REAL /* Lower limit for the data range */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the data */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the data */,
  "median" REAL /* Median value of the data */,
  "upper_limit" REAL /* Upper limit for the data range */,
  "one_sd_lower" REAL /* Value one standard deviation below the mean */,
  "two_sd_lower" REAL /* Value two standard deviations below the mean */,
  "three_sd_lower" REAL /* Value three standard deviations below the mean */,
  "one_sd_upper" REAL /* Value one standard deviation above the mean */,
  "two_sd_upper" REAL /* Value two standard deviations above the mean */,
  "three_sd_upper" REAL /* Value three standard deviations above the mean */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the data */,
  "outlier_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for identifying outliers */,
  "auto_generated" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the data was auto-generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id", "metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data is collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client operates in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the client */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Billing cycle of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client the user belongs to */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the platform */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_reset_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last password reset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who uploaded the data */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric for the uploaded data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded data */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the uploaded file */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the data upload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric related to the alert */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* ID of the month when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES monthly_data ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric for the visualization */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "viz_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project being collaborated on */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., data access, data upload) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric related to the activity */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)
